item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: A Polish streamer, Łatwogang, just pulled off something insane
item.description: A 9-day, 24/7 livestream and over 192 million złoty raised, around $45 million, for kids fighting cancer through Cancer Fighters. That’s not just big. That’s most likely the largest charity livestream in human history ever. That’s what I call a true empathy and compassion.
item.dc:creator: DarthPutinKGB

item.title: She Read The Manifesto. Named Nobody. He Stood Up And Said I AM NOT A PEDOPHILE. Norah Had Not Said Pedophile Yet.
item.description: A gunman tried to shoot up the White House Correspondents Dinner. His manifesto referenced a pedophile, rapist and traitor. Norah O'Donnell read it to Trump. She never said it was about him. Trump immediately shouted "I'M NOT A PEDOPHILE" and "I DIDN'T RAPE ANYBODY." Norah said nothing. This is the most spectacular fucking self-own in the history of television interviews. She read a quote. From a manifesto. About a unnamed person. And the President of the United States immediately identified himself as that person so loudly and so quickly that the edit itself became the confession. He then called her a disgrace and said "you're horrible people" and claimed total exoneration and brought up Epstein. ALL UNPROMPTED. She asked about a shooting at a dinner. He turned it into the most aggressive unsolicited denial of specific crimes in presidential broadcast history. Norah O'Donnell did not accuse him of anything. She read a manifesto. The President heard the words pedophile and rapist and immediately stood up and said NOT ME. The lady doth not protest. The gentleman doth protest EXTREMELY fucking much. #Trump60Minutes #NorahODonnell #ManifestoInterview #ImNotAPedophile #UnsolicitedDenial #TheLadyDothNotProtest #WhiteHouseCorrespondents #SelfOwn #TotalExoneration #HeSaidIt
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: A lot has changed in the last quarter century.

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 249
item.description:
Lovers in a Wood by Carl Spitzweg, 1860.
Arseny Kashkarov
We used to foster ferrets. This was the first time this guy got to run free in a big, open space. His uncoordinated leaps of sheer joy are one of the best things I've ever seen. ~u/loveyousomuch_ok
Funky uncle Jack Black
~u/SirPug_theLast
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: I'll wait for it on netflix..
item.dc:creator: TacticoolWolf

item.title: Work
item.description:
Like most artists on the internet, we're trapped in a cycle of creating content for free while hoping someone eventually notices we're slowly selling off furniture to buy art supplies. If you've enjoyed our comic enough to read to the end of this sentence, consider supporting us on Patreon. You'll get exclusive content featuring characters making even worse life choices than we do: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
https://warandpeas.shop
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milageplus things they wont use like miles/pluspoints they wouldnt mind gifting or using for my future travel things lemme know via dm here. I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: We need a searchable database ...
item.description: Have a local politician who's running for office? Type their name in and boom, a list of everything they said and did that supported MAGA. OR nothing listed if they never did. Did not mean the World Health Organization. Just wanted to emphasize everyone that's in league with Trump in case they decide to change their minds.
item.dc:creator: RetsejRetsej

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @erikleorga made this! This is nice! Kinda want one. Good job! Check out their posts for other stuff.
27 Man Tax: Jared Keeso
“The aim of argument, or of discussion, should not be victory, but progress.” - Joseph Joubert So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: Mapconsuela

item.title: I'm just extremely proud of myself
item.description: Starting in November 2025 I started a 5k training app. Zombies run 5k. It took me 4 months to complete and I made a post when I jogged for 10 minutes. In March I signed up for my first 5k in April that gave me about 5 weeks to get ready. So each week I did 3 Weeks of jogging, learning about how to jog just fast enough to keep my heart rate at a certain BPM because most 5k apps seem to forget that part is really important. Each week I did small interval jogging like one week I did a 10 minute warmup walk, then jog starting at about 8 minutes, walk 3 minutes, then jog 6 minutes, walk 3 minutes, 5 minute jog, then 10 minute cool down. This got a bit longer each week. A week before the 5k I did a test on a friday where I had to jog for 1 mile maintaining my heart rate at under 155bpm, mile 2 was trying to keep it under 160, then mile 3 under 165. When I completed it I remember thinking "Holy shit, did I really just do that?" Proving to myself I could do it. The following week I did runs 3 days, walk days. It was an easy week so 5k day I had energy. Saturday I planned out everything for the Sunday 5k. When I woke up, what time I ate, drank. Clothes laid out. I made coldbrew on Friday, overnight oats on Saturday night. I had the course memorized right down to the hills I'd come across, preparing myself to what I'd do like walk up the hill to reserve energy, and run down on the other side. I created a playlist that would start off with slower music, but each song got more and more intense with the idea of keeping up with me on race day so I wouldn't have fast paced music to start and then run too fast. I was really anxious and needed to focus on what i had control of. Hell I even got ocd and used a tape measure to place my bib on my shirt dead center down to the millimeter(I prefer metric for measuring even though I'm American). Race day arrives, and I execute everything that morning. Get up, eat breakfast, drink coffee, pound a gatorade, shower, put on my race clothes, my running belt, put my headphones in my pocket, and then leave at 7am on the dot. My wife and kids were kind enough to come support me as well as a family friend and my wife's cousin which honestly meant a lot. As I get there I'm nervous still and I must pee 4 times before the race including 1 last time 5 minutes before the race. Right before the race, I start my watch to help me keep my heart rate below certain thresholds, turn on my music, and then like that I just focus on nothing else but my jogging after we get out of start line. The first mile felt like it took an hour. There was so many people in my way that I would try and find gaps to slip past them so I could maintain my pace, trying to keep my heart rate below 155 to start so I wouldn't burn out. After mile 1 was done, mile 2 felt so fast with lots of room on the route and not needing to jump past people, still jogging and only slowing down to a walk occasionally to get my heart rate back down below my threshold, then jogging almost as soon as it lowers back to the target rate. Finally I hit mile 3, and a little past half way I made the mistake of jogging much faster up hill than I had planned and spiking my heart rate so I had to walk for about 2 minutes to get it back down. But finally at the end of mile 3, I release the breaks and haul ass for the last 0.1 mile. As I cross the finish line, I look up like "Holy shit, I did it!" There are photos I saw where my face looks shocked, but then I smile. It was a lot of emotions. I grab my medal off the table, my adrenaline starting to come down, as I look at my wife I suddenly start crying tears of joy. I'm sweaty as hell, hugging my wife, and just crying on her shoulder. I was so proud of myself. I worked so hard and seeking out to do something I have never been able to do. I ran the race at 230lbs. I've already signed up for my next race in may so my journey isn't over yet. My goal for the race was a 50 minute 5k. My race time was 50:36 which pissed me off when I found out cause 36 seconds was probably the time from being crowded with a bunch of people. Anyways, sorry this was so long. TLDR: I trained hard for 5 months to run a 5k while losing weight and completed it. My playlist for the race Own Appeal – Oddisee Stick Season – Noah Kahan Fell On Black Days – Soundgarden The Way I Am – Eminem Criminal – Eminem Burden In My Hand – Soundgarden Black Hole Sun – Soundgarden DarkSide – Bring Me The Horizon Obey (feat. YUNGBLUD) – Bring Me The Horizon A Drug Against War – KMFDM Ultra – KMFDM Toxicity – System Of A Down Duality – Slipknot Dig – Mudvayne Psychosocial – Slipknot Happy? – Mudvayne
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

West side story
MIKE FAISSSSSSST

item.title: President Nixon declared, "I am not a crook," during a televised Q&A session on Nov 17, 1973, with newspaper execs at Disney World. Becoming a defining, controversial and mocked moment in his presidency. Funny how history repeats itself.

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: 20 Years Ago, the WSIB Released the Most Troubling Advertisements
item.description:
In 2006, prime time Canadian TV played host to these horrifying workplace safety PSA's, with the tagline "There Really Are No Accidents"
Sadly I wasn't able to find them in particularly good resolution, other than the first two
These others are all blurry and tiny, but still impactful (see what I did there?)
Pretty soon, children watching started to have nightmares
And parents started to complain at the lack of warning before some of the startling images.
In response, the WSIB, released a second series where the major damage was avoided, like this one.
or this one.
And finally in 2009, this one (which I'm not sure is even a legit ad) somewhat poking fun at the horror of their earlier spots.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: It’s a small thing but it means a lot to me

item.title: 60 Minutes–Trump: "Uh, I'm, I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody. Uh-"– O'Donnell: "Oh, you think-"–Trump: "I'm not a pedophile"–O'Donnell: "Do you think he was referring to you?"–Trump: "Excuse me. I'm not a pedophile. I was totally exonerated."

item.title: Memes vol 669 Musicals
item.description:
They used AI all over the merch for this movie
Jeremy Jordan my favorite singer and I cant sing his range is a cosmic joke
Jeremy Jordan looks so good here. Not going to mention Laura osnes
Non-rhyming lines with absolutely crazy instrumentals: Dave Malloy No matter what song it is, it WILL get stuck in your head: Alan Menken
Guys Ryland Grace was wearing a cats the Broadway musical shirt in project hail Mary
Raise my vocie
Rum Tum Tugger is so sexy
Jack Wolfe my new favorite singer ever. Hey guys if this video doesn’t work I’m going to do something crazy. I haven’t been able to post videos since all the (human) mods left AND I HAVE A LOT TO POST
And “people TURN ON YOU”
Guys who’s going to go see Hadestown proshot in theaters I have plans to go see it 3 separate times YIPPEEEEEEEEE
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Talking about my abuser pt 2. I decided to confront his hypocritical comment on Imgur about safe sex.
item.description: This man assaulted me for half a year beginning four weeks after I turned 15. He now posts online about protecting children from people like Trump and Epstein and protecting women. Meanwhile, he didn’t practice safe sex with me. (Or assault… I was a CHILD.) I got pregnant at 15 and had to have an abortion. It forever made my conservative family judge me harshly and messed with our relationship forever. No more silence from me. I protected him for years. This is Mike Miller, AKA Michael Miller or Michael Sandidge. (His stage name.) He is my abuser.
item.dc:creator: exposingmyabuser

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone, we're excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
PJ is running in to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 5th and 6th by Pizza Angel @pot314 7th, 8th, 9th and 10th by @OP 11th and 12th by Pizza Angel @pot314 13th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 14th by Pizza Angel @KinADress 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th by @OP ... Today's Grocery Tally 1st by @OP 1nd by Grocery Angel @pot314
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
